content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ ts_check ∧ gt(abs(now-ts),"300") ∧ returns("401") ∧ edge_rejects_valid
P: allow_provider_skew ∧ preserve_security ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test
V: valid_webhook_passes ∧ stale_still("401") ∧ test_covers_skew
A: widen_tolerance ∧ add_skew_const ∧ add_regression_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook verification and ts_check and gt(abs(now-ts), "300") and returns("401") and edge_rejects_valid.
Plan: allow_provider_skew and preserve_security and minimal fix and regression test.
Verify: valid_webhook_passes and stale_still("401") and test_covers_skew.
Answer target: widen tolerance window and add_skew_const and add_regression_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: billing_mw ∧ overdue_rule ∧ boundary("24h")
P: grace("24h") ∧ emit("402") ∧ no_loop
V: unit_test ∧ reg_test ∧ idempotent
A: patch_guard ∧ min_fix ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Constraints: billing_mw and overdue_rule and boundary("24h").
Plan: grace("24h") and emit("402") and no refresh loop.
Verify: unit_test and regression test and idempotent.
Answer target: patch_guard and minimal fix and add_reg_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady) ∧ split(compliance_ready)
P: modular_monolith ∧ pg_primary ∧ async_jobs ∧ audit_log ∧ rbac
V: fits_team(9) ∧ meets_ddl("12 weeks") ∧ uses("PostgreSQL") ∧ compliance_ready
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady) and split(compliance-ready).
Plan: modular_monolith and pg_primary and async_jobs and audit log and rbac.
Verify: fits team size(9) and meets deadline("12 weeks") and uses("PostgreSQL") and compliance-ready.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver(default_arch)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("9 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_mlops) ∧ traffic(async_enrichment)
P: small_team ∧ tight_ddl ∧ pt_ops ∧ async_only
V: split(worker_sidecar) ∧ reuse_store ∧ low_ops_load
A: deploy(worker_sidecar) ∧ queue(pg_jobs) ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver(default modular architecture).
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("9 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_mlops) and traffic(async_enrichment).
Plan: small_team and tight_ddl and pt_ops and async_only.
Verify: split(worker sidecar) and reuse_store and low_ops_load.
Answer target: deploy(worker sidecar) and queue(pg_jobs) and store("PostgreSQL") and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: handler("file_download_handler") ∧ anchor("..") ∧ anchor("download")
P: path_traversal ∧ unvalidated_input(req.query.file) ∧ concat_path
V: reject("..") ∧ normalize(path) ∧ enforce_base(baseDir) ∧ whitelist_files
A: sanitize_input ∧ resolve_path ∧ assert_within(baseDir) ∧ res.download(path)

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: handler("file_download_handler") and anchor("..") and anchor("download").
Plan: path_traversal and unvalidated_input(req.query.file) and concat_path.
Verify: reject("..") and normalize(path) and enforce_base(baseDir) and whitelist_files.
Answer target: validate and sanitize input and resolve_path and assert_within(baseDir) and res.download(path).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: secure_query
C: invoice_admin_api ∧ anchor("sort") ∧ anchor("SELECT") ∧ user_input_in_sql
P: sql_injection ∧ order_by_untrusted ∧ data_exfil_risk ∧ string_concat
V: whitelist("sort") ∧ parameterize ∧ reject_unknown ∧ test_injection
A: mitigate(sql_injection) ∧ validate(sort_column) ∧ verify(pentest)

[AUDIT]
Goal: secure_query.
Constraints: invoice_admin_api and anchor("sort") and anchor("SELECT") and user_input_in_sql.
Plan: sql_injection and order_by_untrusted and data_exfil_risk and string_concat.
Verify: whitelist("sort") and validate then parameterize and validate unknown values rejected and test_injection.
Answer target: mitigate(sql_injection) and validate(sort_column) and verify(pentest).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(reconcileBatch)
C: uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ minimal_change
P: order(load_batch → db.fetchRows → apply_rules → db.save → emit_metrics) ∧ on_db_err("next(err)")
V: preserves_order ∧ anchors_present ∧ diff_minimal
A: apply_refactor ∧ run_tests ∧ emit_metrics

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(reconcileBatch).
Constraints: uses("async") and uses("await") and minimal_change.
Plan: order(load_batch then db.fetchRows then apply_rules then db.save then emit_metrics) and on_db_err("next(err)").
Verify: preserves_order and anchors_present and diff_minimal.
Answer target: apply_refactor and run_tests and emit_metrics.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ order(session_check → db.findUser → flags.load → audit.log → next)
P: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ on_db_err("next(err)")
V: no_behavior_change ∧ no_new_deps ∧ anchors_echoed
A: gt(convert_callbacks,async_await) ∧ await(db.findUser) ∧ await(flags.load) ∧ await(audit.log) ∧ gt(try_catch,next(err))

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadGatewayUser).
Constraints: uses("async") and uses("await") and order(session check then db.findUser then flags.load then audit.log then next).
Plan: preserve execution order and minimal_change and on_db_err("next(err)").
Verify: no_behavior_change and no_new_deps and anchors_echoed.
Answer target: gt(convert_callbacks, async/await) and await(db.findUser) and await(flags.load) and await(audit.log) and gt(try/catch, next(err)).
